scripts.test:sdk-lifecycle: pnpm run test:sdk-go && pnpm run test:sdk-csharp && pnpm run test:sdk-java && pnpm run test:sdk-php && pnpm run test:sdk-ruby
scripts.test: pnpm run test:sdk-ts && pnpm run test:sdk-py
scripts.data:prep-pr: pnpm run openapi:gen && pnpm run validate:data && pnpm run validate:pricing && pnpm run validate:gateway && pnpm run validate:docs
scripts.validate:docs: pnpm run docs:links && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.validate:web: pnpm run web:lint && pnpm run web:build
scripts.validate:api: pnpm run api:lint && pnpm run api:build
scripts.packages:test:cli: cd packages/cli/phaseo && pnpm run test && node dist/index.js --help && node dist/index.js --version && node dist/index.js version --json
scripts.validate:cli: pnpm run packages:build:cli && pnpm run packages:test:cli && pnpm run packages:pack:cli
scripts.packages:build:ts: pnpm --filter @phaseo/devtools-core run build && cd packages/sdk/sdk-ts && pnpm run build
scripts.packages:build:agent-sdk: cd packages/sdk/agent-sdk-ts && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.validate:packages: pnpm run packages:build:ts && pnpm run packages:pack:ts && pnpm run packages:build:agent-sdk && pnpm run packages:pack:agent-sdk && pnpm run packages:build:ai-sdk-provider && pnpm run packages:build:py
scripts.openapi:lint: pnpm run openapi:normalize && spectral lint apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:ts: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:ts --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:py: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:py --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:go: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:go --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:csharp: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:csharp --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:php: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:php --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:ruby: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:ruby --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:java: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:java --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:cpp: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:cpp --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:gen:rust: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js gen:rust --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml
scripts.oapi:ir: pnpm run openapi:sync-enums && pnpm run openapi:normalize && pnpm run oapi:build && node packages/openapi/oapi-cli/dist/cli.js ir --spec apps/docs/openapi/v1/openapi.yaml --out packages/openapi/oapi-cli/ir.json
scripts.openapi:gen: pnpm run openapi:gen:ts && pnpm run openapi:gen:py && pnpm run openapi:gen:go && pnpm run openapi:gen:csharp && pnpm run openapi:gen:php && pnpm run openapi:gen:ruby && pnpm run openapi:gen:java && pnpm run openapi:gen:cpp && pnpm run openapi:gen:rust
scripts.changeset:version: pnpm exec changeset version && pnpm run sdk-py:sync-version && pnpm run sdk:sync-language-manifests
scripts.precommit: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run validate:data && pnpm run validate:pricing && pnpm run validate:gateway && pnpm run openapi:lint && pnpm run validate:docs && pnpm run validate:web && pnpm run validate:api && pnpm run validate:packages && pnpm run sdk:check-version-literals && (cd apps/web && pnpm run test) && pnpm run test
